task_completion.description: Agent logged into the Nx Witness Web Admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness Web Admin dashboard or interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Parking Lot Camera is configured for 24/7 continuous high-quality recording.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recording settings for 'Parking Lot Camera' show recording is enabled, the schedule is set for all days and hours (24/7), and the recording quality is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Server Room Camera is configured for 24/7 continuous high-quality recording.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The recording settings for 'Server Room Camera' show recording is enabled, the schedule is set for all days and hours (24/7), and the recording quality is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: A layout named 'Compliance Audit View' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A layout specifically named 'Compliance Audit View' is visible in the layouts list or as an active tab in the interface.

task_completion.description: All cameras are added to the 'Compliance Audit View' layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Compliance Audit View' layout displays video feeds or camera items for 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Server Room Camera', and 'Entrance Camera'.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Nx Witness Web Admin.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open and navigated to the Nx Witness Web Admin URL, showing genuine GUI interaction.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or curl commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show execution of curl commands, python scripts, or other API calls to configure the cameras or create the layout.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Nx Witness interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Nx Witness Web Admin UI, not a text editor, HTML file, or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The system has three cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Server Room Camera', and 'Entrance Camera'. 'Parking Lot Camera' and 'Server Room Camera' start with recording disabled. 'Entrance Camera' starts with recording enabled. The target layout must be named exactly 'Compliance Audit View' and contain all three cameras.
